name: Unofficial Telegram User Bridge
description: Agent tools for one live Telegram user account with isolated OpenClaw contexts and backend-enforced policies.

apiToken.description: Optional Bearer token (set TELEGRAM_BRIDGE_API_TOKEN on backend to require)

policyProfile.description: Backend policy profile for the legacy single-context mode

replyDelaySec.description: Reply delay override enforced by the backend in legacy single-context mode

replyDelayMaxSec.description: Optional max delay override enforced by the backend in legacy single-context mode

allowFrom.description: Readable chat ids/usernames enforced by the backend in legacy single-context mode

denyFrom.description: Denied read chat ids/usernames enforced by the backend in legacy single-context mode

writeTo.description: Writable chat ids/usernames enforced by the backend in legacy single-context mode; empty means write denied

denyWriteTo.description: Denied write chat ids/usernames enforced by the backend in legacy single-context mode

profiles.description: Optional isolated OpenClaw contexts that register separate tool sets bound to backend policy profiles

id.description: Stable tool/profile id, for example owner, wife, shared

label.description: Human-readable label used in tool descriptions

policyProfile.description: Backend policy profile to use for this context
